title: Hermes Agent 5.0 (New Upgrades): HERMES BECAME ULTRA-HERMES!
summary: Hermes Agent 0.16 introduces a native desktop application for macOS, Linux, and Windows alongside an enhanced web dashboard. The release adds remote gateway support, improved model selection with fuzzy search, session undo functionality, and strengthened security including SSRF checks and safer subprocess handling.
